text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are on our way<n>back to the
academy, when...
O-Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I recognize you... We met the other<n>day!

I'm terribly sorry, but she insisted on<n>speaking
with you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That is no problem at all. Nothing<n>makes me
happier than granting a<n>princess's wishes.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-Opera O... Ah... Um... Ngh...

Ah! Is my gaze too much for you to<n>bear? Is the
glimmer in my eyes the<n>cause for your anxiety?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, what am I to do? All this<n>because of my
wondrous eyes!
choice_data_list: What if we took a little walk while we talked?

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes, that would be very good for<n>her. But
please keep it short. I'll be<n>waiting here.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Opera O... Is that your school?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is, indeed. This is where I diligently<n>study and
hone my beauty alongside<n>my friends.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: You... work hard. Really hard, huh?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I knew it... I never could... Hic...Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Princess?! What troubles you?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I knew I'd never... sniffle... sparklelike you... Sob... Hic...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No, allow me to handle this! Look after<n>the
princess, just for a moment!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text:
I wanna... be just like Opera O. I<n>wanna get better...
and sparkle...

B-but... s-surgery is too scary. I can't<n>be like her...
So I... That's why I<n>wanted to talk.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Is she... scared ofanything?

Things that frighten T.M. Opera O...<n>That's a hard
question.
Oh... Yeah... She's very pretty...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! Trainer, say that again, but<n>boldly and in
my presence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As if I heard a call from the secret<n>garden, I
suddenly had to speak with<n>the nurse.

Oh, and Princess, do you know what<n>the key to
beauty is?
Key?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The answer is to bask in my<n>presence! This light
that has brought<n>hope to untold masses!

With that, T.M. Opera O hands the girl<n>a small
mirror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Here, take my hand mirror. Now have<n>a gander at
your reflection.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The girl in that mirror is beautiful.<n>Yes... you are
sparkling!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I am? I... sparkle?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The mirror does not lie! You simply<n>had yet to
notice it!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hold onto it until the shine is evident<n>to your own
eyes. Indulge until you<n>tire of looking!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: ...I sparkle, too. Ehehe! Maybe...<n>you're right!

And so, with her eyes fixed on the<n>mirror, and a
big smile across her<n>face, the girl returns to the
hospital<n>with the nurse.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The nurse told me she's scheduled<n>to have
surgery.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The procedure isn't life threatening,<n>but that
doesn't change how frightful<n>it is. We should go
visit her that day.

T.M. Opera O and I watch on as the<n>girl's tiny
frame disappears in the<n>distance.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Opera O's amazing. But I'm just a<n>scaredy cat...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: What reason do you have to be so<n>crestfallen?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I returned but moments ago.<n>The nurse
should be here shortly.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to repeat myself, Princess.<n>There is no
need for the long face.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Tell me, Princess. Who is reflected in<n>your eyes
this very moment?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: Um... Y-you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! I, the epitome of beauty, am<n>in your
eyes!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Therefore... there is no space left for<n>fright!

I can't make heads or tails of what<n>she's saying,
but the girl's face<n>brightens as she looks up at
Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I get it... Things can't be scary if I<n>think about you!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text:
Oh... But... I wonder if I'll remember<n>when I get
scared.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I've just the thing. How about this?
With that, she hands the girl a small<n>hand mirror.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That mirror has reflected my beauty<n>day in and
day out. I have two, so this<n>one I lend to you.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My presence resides within it—a<n>reminder of me
whenever you look<n>upon it.
And it can bring out a radiance ofyour very own! Such as the moon isilluminated by the sun!

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Ehehe... I've got Opera O's<n>mirror!

And so, the girl returns to the hospital<n>with the
nurse.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The nurse told me she's scheduled<n>to have
surgery.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The procedure isn't life threatening,<n>but this
doesn't change how frightful<n>it is. We should go
visit her that day.

T.M. Opera O and I watch on as the<n>girl's tiny
frame disappears in the<n>distance.
